wine_bars.name: El Lagar de Isilla
wine_bars.address: C/ Isilla 18, 09400 Aranda de Duero, Burgos, Spain
wine_bars.wine_program: 450-reference cellar spanning DO Ribera del Duero, Rioja, Rueda and other Spanish regions; wines served in 13th-century underground cellar 12 m below street level; free cellar visit during opening hours
signature_pours: Aged Crianza pours from cellar stock
wine_bars.description: Restaurant and wine bar with a 450-reference list preserved in natural-condition 13th-century underground cellars in Aranda de Duero. Cellar visit included during service; one of the most atmosphere-rich wine stops in the region.

verified.address_quoted: C. Isilla, 18, 09400 Aranda de Duero, Burgos, Spain

wine_bars.name: Agora de Protos Wine Bar
wine_bars.address: C/ Bodegas Protos 24-28, 47300 Penafiel, Valladolid, Spain
wine_bars.wine_program: Full Bodegas Protos range by the glass including Crianza, Reserva and Gran Reserva; tapas and pintxos; indoor and outdoor terrace overlooking the Richard Rogers winery building
wine_bars.description: Wine bar in the central Agora of the Bodegas Protos visitor complex, open to non-tour visitors for glass pours and pintxos. Terrace commands views of Penafiel castle and the Richard Rogers-designed winery.

wine_bars.name: Arzuaga Wine Bar
wine_bars.address: Carretera N-122 Km 325, 47350 Quintanilla de Onesimo, Valladolid, Spain
wine_bars.wine_program: Full Arzuaga range by the glass from Roble to Gran Reserva; Pago Florentino and La Planta labels also available; integrated with Hotel and Spa Arzuaga
wine_bars.description: Wine bar within the Arzuaga estate complex on the Golden Mile. Walk-in pours available throughout the day; located adjacent to the Michelin-starred Taller by Amaya Arzuaga restaurant.

verified.address_quoted: Carretera N-122, 325, 47350 Quintanilla de Onesimo, Valladolid

wine_bars.name: Bodega Emina Wine Bar
wine_bars.address: Ctra. San Bernardo s/n, 47359 Valbuena de Duero, Valladolid, Spain
wine_bars.wine_program: Matarromera Group portfolio by the glass including Emina, Matarromera and Cyan labels; wine-and-art themed space with views towards the Cistercian Valbuena monastery
wine_bars.description: Wine bar and cultural space within the Bodega Emina visitor centre in Valbuena de Duero. Part of the Matarromera Group; terrace views of the 12th-century Cistercian monastery across the valley.

verified.address_quoted: Ctra. San Bernardo, s/n. Valbuena de Duero

wine_bars.name: Bodegas Nabal Wine Bar
wine_bars.address: A1 Highway exit 168, Valle de Nabal, 09370 Gumiel de Izan, Burgos, Spain
wine_bars.wine_program: Nabal estate wines and curated Ribera del Duero producer selection; covered porch with valley views; tapas including Iberian charcuterie and Burgos cheeses
wine_bars.description: Covered porch wine bar at the Nabal winery. Sourcing grapes from near-century-old vines in Gumiel de Izan; family-estate pours served with Iberian ham and regional cheeses. Easy A1 motorway access.

verified.address_quoted: A1 Highway exit 168, Valle de Nabal, 09370 Gumiel de Izan, Burgos

wine_bars.name: Bodegas Comenge Wine Bar
wine_bars.address: Camino del Castillo s/n, 47346 Curiel del Duero, Valladolid, Spain
wine_bars.wine_program: Comenge organic estate wines by the glass; panoramic restaurant and terrace with Curiel de Duero castle views; garden picnic tastings by reservation
wine_bars.description: Wine bar and panoramic terrace at the Comenge organic winery at the foot of Curiel de Duero castle. Garden picnics and art installations complement the wine programme; weekend morning visits popular.

verified.address_quoted: Camino del Castillo s/n, 47346 Curiel del Duero, Spain

wine_bars.name: Dominio Lubiano Wine Bar
wine_bars.address: Ctr Pesquera-Valbuena Polig 9 Parc 66, 47315 Pesquera de Duero, Valladolid, Spain
wine_bars.wine_program: Estate wines by the glass and curated regional pours; glass-and-concrete bar with Golden Mile viewpoint; small-group tastings led by co-owner Monica
wine_bars.description: Avant-garde wine bar at this family estate on the Golden Mile. Views from the terrace take in the 18th-century hermitage and 12th-century Valbuena Cistercian monastery; informal service from the winemaking family.

verified.address_quoted: CTR PESQUERA - VALBUENA POLG 9 PARC.66, 47315 Pesquera de Duero, Valladolid

wine_bars.name: Abadia Retuerta Cellar Lounge
wine_bars.address: Monasterio de Santa Maria, 122 Km. 332.5, 47340 Sardon de Duero, Valladolid, Spain
wine_bars.wine_program: Full pago catalog by the glass including Seleccion Especial, Petit Verdot and single-pago labels; library vintages; Romanesque vaulted interiors; exclusive to hotel guests and reservation visitors
wine_bars.description: Wine lounge in the vaulted cellars of the 12th-century Abadia Retuerta abbey. Full estate pago catalog including library vintages; the Romanesque stone setting is unmatched in the Ribera del Duero wine zone.

wine_bars.name: Castilla Termal Monks Wine Cellar
wine_bars.address: San Bernardo s/n, 47359 Valbuena de Duero, Valladolid, Spain
wine_bars.wine_program: DO Ribera del Duero selection and the hotel's own Converso label; food-pairing flights curated by the sommelier; Gothic-frescoed monastery setting
signature_pours: DO Ribera del Duero Grand Cru flight
wine_bars.description: The Monks Wine Cellar within Castilla Termal Monasterio de Valbuena. Guests taste regional and international wines paired with dishes; the hotel's own Converso wine is an internationally-awarded limited production Tempranillo.

verified.address_quoted: San Bernardo, Valbuena de Duero, Valladolid

wine_bars.name: Vinoteca y Artesania Zaguan
wine_bars.address: Plaza Espana s/n, 47300 Penafiel, Valladolid, Spain
wine_bars.wine_program: 450-reference selection of DO Ribera del Duero, Rueda, Cigales, Toro and Tierra de Castilla y Leon; wine by the glass and bottle; artisan food products alongside
wine_bars.description: Wine retail bar in central Penafiel with 450 references from the key Castilla y Leon designations. Convenient before or after visiting Penafiel castle; wine accessories and regional delicacies also stocked.

wine_bars.name: VinosRibera.com Gourmet Centre Wine Bar
wine_bars.address: Ctra. N-1 Km. 153.5, 09471 Fuentespina, Burgos, Spain
wine_bars.wine_program: Over 100 Ribera del Duero producers; climate-controlled cellar; by-the-glass and structured vertical tastings; gourmet products from Castilla y Leon alongside
wine_bars.description: Largest commercial wine showcase in Ribera del Duero, on the A1 road at Fuentespina. Represents over 100 producers with a tasting bar, conditioned cellar and gourmet shop; an ideal first stop for visitors entering the wine zone.

verified.address_quoted: Ctra. N-1, km. 153,5 (Exit 152-153 A-1), 09471 Fuentespina - Burgos, Spain

wine_bars.name: Bodegas Portia Agora Wine Bar
wine_bars.address: Antigua Carretera Nacional 1 Km. 170, 09370 Gumiel de Izan, Burgos, Spain
wine_bars.wine_program: Portia estate range by the glass including Triennia, Summa, Crianza and Roble; tapas and pintxos; Norman Foster building provides the dramatic backdrop
wine_bars.description: Wine bar in the central Agora of the Bodegas Portia Norman Foster complex in Gumiel de Izan. Open to walk-in visitors outside guided tour times; star-shaped architectural interior is itself a draw.

verified.address_quoted: Antigua Carretera Nacional 1 Km. 170, 09370 Gumiel de Izan, Burgos, Spain

wine_bars.name: Enoteca Agropal Wine Bar
wine_bars.wine_program: DO Ribera del Duero and other Castilla y Leon designations by the glass; set in renovated 1953 grain silo with gourmet supermarket; Iberian products and cheeses alongside
wine_bars.description: Wine bar inside the renovated 1953 FEGA grain silo on the Pesquera road in Penafiel. Opened October 2022; accessible car park; combines a tasting bar with a gourmet supermarket of Castilla y Leon products.

wine_bars.name: Bodegas Felix Callejo Tasting Bar
wine_bars.address: Avenida del Cid Km. 16, 09441 Sotillo de la Ribera, Burgos, Spain
wine_bars.wine_program: Callejo estate range including Callejo, Flores de Callejo and single-parcel Majuelos de Callejo by the glass; Burgos charcuterie pairings
wine_bars.description: Family tasting bar at the Callejo winery in Sotillo de la Ribera. Personal service from the Callejo family; old-vine Tempranillo pours; charcuterie board with Burgos morcilla and Iberian cuts.

verified.address_quoted: Avenida del Cid, Km. 16, 09441 Sotillo de la Ribera, Burgos, Espana

wine_bars.name: Finca Villacreces Wine Terrace
wine_bars.address: Carretera Soria (N-122) Km. 322, 47350 Quintanilla de Onesimo, Valladolid, Spain
wine_bars.wine_program: Estate wines from organic viticulture by the glass including Pruno and Finca Villacreces labels; seasonal terrace with Duero river and pine forest views
wine_bars.description: Terrace wine bar at Finca Villacreces, bordered by the Duero river and bicentennial pines adjacent to Vega Sicilia. Organic estate pours; post-e-bike-tour tasting is a signature offer here.

verified.address_quoted: Carretera Soria (N-122) Km. 322, 47350 Quintanilla de Onesimo, Valladolid, Espana
